title: Celebrating Our Digital Heroes on Techies Day
story: Every October 3, people celebrate National Techies Day to honor the computer wizards who keep our digital world running! Tech workers, programmers, and IT experts get special recognition for fixing our computers, creating awesome apps, and solving tricky technology problems. Companies throw pizza parties for their tech teams, kids thank their school's computer helpers, and families appreciate the people who set up their home Wi-Fi. Social media fills with posts saying "Thanks, techies!" and sharing funny memes about computer glitches. Some schools even invite local programmers to show students how coding works, making this day perfect for discovering how cool technology careers can be!
activity_question: How do people commonly show appreciation to tech workers on National Techies Day?
activity_choices: Companies throw pizza parties for their tech teams
Everyone deletes their social media accounts
People stop using computers for the whole day
Tech workers have to work extra hours
activity_answer: Companies throw pizza parties for their tech teams
follow_up_question: What technology problem would you want a techie to help you solve?

title: Custard's Last Stand: National Caramel Custard Day
story: Spoons everywhere rejoice on October 3 for National Caramel Custard Day! This silky dessert gets its moment to shine as people dig into bowls of creamy custard topped with golden caramel sauce. Restaurants feature special custard menus, home bakers whip up their grandmother's recipes, and social media fills with photos of perfectly caramelized treats. The best part? That satisfying crack when you tap the caramelized sugar on top of crème brûlée!
activity_question: What happens when you tap the top of crème brûlée?
bonus_fact: Crème brûlée means "burnt cream" in French!

title: Leaf Peeping Gets Its Own Day!
story: Every October 3, people celebrate Look at the Leaves Day by doing exactly what it sounds like - staring at colorful autumn leaves! Families take nature walks, snap photos of red and gold trees, and collect their favorite fallen leaves for crafts. Some people even plan special leaf-peeping road trips to see the most spectacular fall colors in their area.
activity_question: What do people collect on Look at the Leaves Day?
follow_up_question: What's your favorite fall leaf color and why?

title: On Wednesdays We Wear Pink Day
story: Every October 3, fans of the movie Mean Girls celebrate by quoting their favorite lines and wearing pink! This special day started because of a famous scene where a character asks what day it is, and someone replies "It's October 3rd." People post selfies in pink outfits, share movie quotes on social media, and some schools even have themed dress-up days. Friends get together to watch the movie and recite lines like "You can't sit with us!" and "That's so fetch!" It's become a fun way for people to bond over this popular comedy and show their love for the film's memorable characters and hilarious moments.
activity_question: What do people typically wear on Mean Girls Day?
follow_up_question: What's your favorite movie quote that you like to say with friends?
